title: Harness Collar For Dogs And Cats
description: Changes the collar texture of dogs & cats to that of a harness.
body:
Changes the collar texture of dogs & cat to that of a harness like collar, I made this a few years ago as a member of my family server keep mistaking the pets of other members as their own.

----

Works with FreshLX's [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), just make sure to place this resource pack above their's.
